meta.title: Gastro Master | QR Code Flyers for Restaurants — Direct Orders from Print
meta.description: With the QR Code Flyer Add-On from Gastro Master, customers order directly from paper flyers. Automatic URL generation, tracking & analytics, print-ready designs. Perfect for pizzerias, delivery services & restaurants.

hero.headline: QR Code Flyer
hero.subline: Turn every flyer into an ordering channel. One scan, one tap — and your customers order directly in your webshop or app. Custom design, print-ready.

problem.title: The Problem with Classic Flyers
points: Customers have to Google your restaurant first — often ending up on Lieferando & Co.
The journey from 'flyer in hand' to first order takes 3–5 minutes — too many drop-offs.
Typing URLs doesn't work anymore — flyers end up unused in the bin.

solution.title: The Solution: QR Code Flyer
points: Every flyer gets the QR code to your online shop and optionally to your app.
One scan — in 2 seconds the customer is in the menu, no Google detour, no platform commission.
Through offers and promotions on your flyer, you make your customers aware of your online shop and app.
Print-ready PDFs in your branding — send directly to the printer, done.

features.headline: What Makes Your Flyers Successful
features.sub: A QR code on the flyer is all it takes — your customers land directly in ordering without detours.

items.title: Lightning-Fast Ordering Link
items.description: The QR code leads directly to your webshop or app — no annoying intermediate pages, no loading times.

items.title: Immediately Ready to Use
items.description: Create QR code, print flyers, distribute. No setup, no technical hurdles — it works right away.

items.title: Full Branding Control
items.description: The link can be designed with your logo, your colours, your text — your flyer stays your flyer.

items.title: Discount Codes on the Flyer
items.description: Advertise discount codes on your flyer? The QR code leads to your shop/app, customers enter the codes there. This way you pull them away from expensive platforms.

items.title: Always Included
items.description: With any software package: The first 2,500 DIN A6 flyers + first design are always included. Afterwards volume pricing.

items.title: Print-Ready Templates
items.description: Your flyer is ready to print immediately — or you design it completely yourself with your agency.

useCases.headline: How Restaurateurs Use the QR Code Flyer
useCases.sub: Three real scenarios from our customer base — from the neighbourhood to the chain.

items.title: Pizzeria in a Residential Area
items.story: A Berlin pizza baker distributes 2,000 flyers with QR codes within a 3 km radius. Result: +40% direct orders in 4 weeks — without platform commission of 14%.

items.title: Delivery Service Chain
items.story: A burger chain from Munich prints QR codes on every delivery package. Regular customers scan instead of Googling — reorder rate rose from 22% to 38%.

items.title: Stand Out with Promotions
items.story: A pizzeria features an attractive offer on its flyer: '20% off with code FLYER20'. Customers enter this code directly when ordering in the shop — landing in your system instead of Lieferando. Every promotion pulls customers away from expensive platforms.

stats.label: more direct orders with QR code flyers

pricing.headline: Pricing & Availability
pricing.note: The QR code flyer system is included free in every webshop and app subscription. You only pay for printing — transparent by quantity, no hidden fees.
pricing.tiersNote: All prices net plus VAT. Includes printing, bleed, individual QR code and shipping within Germany. Individual quantities on request.

internalLinks.headline: Works Perfectly With
internalLinks.intro: The QR code flyer unfolds its full potential combined with your ordering channel. Both options are fully compatible with the add-on.

items.title: Webshop
items.description: Direct deep-link from the flyer to your webshop — no app download, immediately in the browser. Ideal for new customer acquisition.

items.title: Own Ordering App
items.description: QR code opens your app from the store — or the webshop if the app is not installed. Smart fallback included.

faq.headline: Frequently Asked Questions about the QR Code Flyer
faq.sub: Answers to the questions we receive most often from restaurateurs across Germany and the DACH region.

items.q: What does a QR code flyer cost for my restaurant?
items.a: The first 2,500 flyers are free and included in every package. After that you only pay for printing by quantity: from €65 for 2,500 pieces to €1,117 for 50,000 pieces (net, plus VAT, including printing, bleed, individual QR code and shipping within Germany). Individual quantities are available on request at any time.

items.q: How quickly are the flyers produced and delivered?
items.a: After design approval, the standard production time is 3–5 working days, plus 1–2 days shipping within Germany. Express production is available at extra cost — for urgent campaigns (e.g. opening, special promotion) we deliver within 48 hours.

items.q: Can I connect the QR code flyer to my existing webshop?
items.a: Yes, if you already use a Gastro Master webshop or ordering app, the QR code flyer add-on is immediately ready. The codes are automatically linked to your system — no setup, no integration, no developers needed.

items.q: Do I need my own ordering app for the QR code flyer?
items.a: No, an app is not a prerequisite. The QR code can lead directly to your webshop — guests order immediately in the browser, without a download. If you also have an app, it opens automatically if installed — otherwise the webshop takes over (smart fallback).

items.q: What print quality do the flyers have?
items.a: All flyers are produced on high-quality 250 g/m² coated paper with 4/4-colour printing (Euroscale, CMYK). Format: DIN A6. Finish: choose between matte or glossy.

items.q: How can I use the flyer to target customers with special offers?
items.a: The QR code leads directly to your shop or app. You can note a coupon code on the flyer (e.g. 'Flyer20' for 20% off). The customer enters this code directly when ordering in your shop — this makes it easier for them to get away from expensive platforms and saves them time. Your system is thus many times more direct and cheaper than delivery platforms.

items.q: How do I make sure my flyers actually drive revenue?
items.a: In the Gastro Master dashboard you can see live per flyer campaign: number of scans, resulting orders, revenue and the effective cost-per-order. After just a few days you can see which areas, audiences or promotions perform — and order reprints only where the flyer pays off.
